meaning: n.磨房主,面粉厂主,碾磨工,铣工,[昆]蛾
examples: Miller professed himself dissatisfied with Broadway theatre.
The critic found the play "a feeble rehash of familiar Miller themes."
Miller starts to argue with Alice.
"Bees are reasonably well equipped to handle bad weather at the appropriate times, " says Norton Miller.
As a value investor, Miller likes to accumulate stocks that have fallen to new lows.
